response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with consistent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern DevOps practices (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD). He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, matching a key required skill. His work with AWS CDK, MongoDB, PostgreSQL (implied via SQL/MySQL), and testing frameworks (TDD, Vitest-equivalent practices) aligns with the stack and responsibilities. He has led open-source projects, contributed to architecture, and demonstrated strong communication via workshops and talks. His education includes a BS in Computer Science. Concerns include lack of explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest (though Node/TypeScript/testing experience is strong), minimal mention of Kotlin/Java beyond past roles, and German language proficiency being only basic in a Berlin-based role (though English is fluent). His extensive DLang and legacy tech experience may suggest over-diversification, but his recent roles focus squarely on the required stack.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, directly matching a key requirement
Strong track record in architecture, testing (TDD), DevOps (Docker/K8s), and open-source leadership
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in recent roles (though equivalent stack is present)
Kotlin/Java experience is dated and not recent (last noted in 2020)
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based teams
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the core requirements with deep, recent full-stack experience in the primary stack, proven AI-agent work, and strong architecture/testing practices. While he lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, his mastery of equivalent technologies and demonstrated ability to adapt tools makes this a minor gap. His German limitation is a minor risk but not a blocker given English fluency and remote-friendly collaboration norms. His open-source leadership and process maturity add significant value.
